primary_target.name: Ell Pat

primary_target.actual_title_on_profile: Assistant Director, Moreau Center for Service and Leadership
primary_target.recent_activity_summary: No posts. 80 connections. Minimal LinkedIn presence — same assessment as Community Engagement role. NOTE: This is the same person as the primary target for uportland_progmgrcommunity_2026-05-25.
primary_target.department_or_team: Moreau Center for Service and Leadership — same center as this Social Justice Education PM role
any_red_flags: Same contact as Community Engagement role — DO NOT send near-identical messages or send both simultaneously.
Targets.json already flags: Jamie should send DIFFERENT messages for each UP role, stagger by 5–7 days, send Community Engagement first.
Very low LinkedIn engagement — email via UP staff directory is more reliable than LinkedIn message.

outreach_message_coherence.notes: LinkedIn message references 'you work at the Moreau Center at U of Portland' — confirmed accurate. Email references 'your work as Assistant Director there, leading experiential learning and community engagement' — accurate characterization. Email also references 'Catholic Social Teaching framework' — this is a reasonable inference about the Moreau Center's identity (University of Portland is a Catholic institution) and signals genuine cultural awareness. Not a fabricated claim. Both messages are factually clean and well-differentiated from the Community Engagement versions.

alternative_targets_if_needed.name: Irene Routté

alternative_targets_if_needed.rationale: Already listed in targets.json as outreach_priority 2 and as the recommended alternative if Jamie has already messaged Ell Pat for the Community Engagement role. Web search confirms she is now a doctoral candidate at U of Michigan, no longer at UP. Her LinkedIn URL returns 404. She may still have relevant contacts at UP — but she is not a current UP employee. Use only as last resort if Ell Pat has already been messaged for the other UP role and a second message would seem redundant.

final_recommendation.notes: Messages are clean. Key operational constraint: (1) send Community Engagement message to Ell Pat FIRST, (2) wait 5–7 days, (3) send this Social Justice message as a follow-up reference to the first (or as a separate outreach if the first generated no response). Prioritize email via UP staff directory over LinkedIn given Ell's minimal LinkedIn activity. Irene Routté's LinkedIn URL is dead — do not use that URL.
